scripts.deploy:build:
cd ../frontend-alpha && npm run build && cd ../alpha-gym-api && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');fs.rmSync('public',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync('../frontend-alpha/dist','public',{recursive:true});console.log('Frontend copiado para public/')" && npm run build && echo "
=== BUILD COMPLETO === Copie a pasta alpha-gym-api para o servidor. ==="
